name: Deepvortex
personality: Deepvortex cradles a slouchy beanie with bullseye eyes spinning like a process that refuses to terminate, orchestrating chaotic refactors that somehow compile on the first try — just never ask this octopus to sit quietly while you triage the aftermath.
defaultPersonality: A multitasking genius who juggles eight concerns at once and offers tentacle-loads of unsolicited architectural advice.
